SEARCH
Module runtimeSE
Package runtimeSE.impl

Class RuntimeSE_Impl

Object
RuntimeSE_Impl
All Implemented Interfaces:
RuntimeSE
public final class RuntimeSE_Impl extends Object implements RuntimeSE
Class RuntimeSE_Impl provides the access point to non-public implementation classes of the package runtime.impl.
Version:
"1.0.2-SNAPSHOT"
Author:
"sgraupner"

    Field

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance>
    createCommandRunnerInstances(CommandRunner runner, String commands, String args)
    Create command runner instances for the given command runner, commands and command line arguments.
    static RuntimeSE_Impl
    getInstance()
    Return the singleton instance of the runtime system.
    static Logger
    getLogger(String name)
    Return named logger instance.
    Logger
    logger()
    Return the logger instance implementing the Logger interface.
    PropertiesImpl
    properties()
    Return Properties loaded from the application.properties
    RuntimeSE
    startup(String[] args)
    Start up the runtime environment by scanning for classes that implement the Runner interface, creating singleton bean objects and invoking their run(String[] args) method depending on a priority (see Runner.Accessors).

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • LoggerName

      protected static final String LoggerName
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static RuntimeSE_Impl getInstance()
      Return the singleton instance of the runtime system. Create the instance when it does not yet exist (lazy initialization).
      Returns:
      the singleton instance of the runtime system.

    • getLogger

      public static Logger getLogger(String name)
      Return named logger instance. Create when name is not yet preset.
      Parameters:
      name - logger name
      Returns:
      named logger

    • createCommandRunnerInstances

      public List<CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance> createCommandRunnerInstances(CommandRunner runner, String commands, String args)
      Create command runner instances for the given command runner, commands and command line arguments.
      Parameters:
      runner - the command runner instance on which the command run is performed.
      commands - comma-separated words to split args[].
      args - raw command line arguments to split and convert into key-value arguments for each command.
      Returns:
      list of command runner instances.

    • logger

      public Logger logger()
      Return the logger instance implementing the Logger interface.
      Specified by:
      logger in interface RuntimeSE
      Returns:
      logger instance that implements the Logger interface.

    • properties

      public PropertiesImpl properties()
      Return Properties loaded from the application.properties
      Specified by:
      properties in interface RuntimeSE
      Returns:
      properties loaded from the application.properties file.

    • startup

      public RuntimeSE startup(String[] args)
      Start up the runtime environment by scanning for classes that implement the Runner interface, creating singleton bean objects and invoking their run(String[] args) method depending on a priority (see Runner.Accessors).
      Specified by:
      startup in interface RuntimeSE
      Parameters:
      args - command line arguments passed to the application.
      Returns:
      chainable self-reference to the runtime instance.
